title: Monday doc editable by mobile
excerpt: Monday docs are not editable by mobile - android- this makes working on I.e. ideas, concepts points,… very impractical and slowly…for users

posts.author: Hepo (Heinz Polak )
posts.cookedHtml: Monday docs are not editable by mobile - android- this makes working on I.e. ideas, concepts points,… very impractical and slowly…for users

posts.author: NielsLA (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi mondday, this would be very usefull. Would this be possible in future?

posts.author: Sovvyg (Lauren Gale )
posts.cookedHtml: Any news on whether this is roadmapped? I’m at the Monday elevate conference and it’s super frustrating to have to get my laptop out every time I want to make notes.. ideally I want to be able to use Monday for this on mobile and not have to use a different note taker like notion which also has AI note taking built in
